batteryCapacity.english: The milliamp hour capacity of your battery.
batteryCapacity.translation: The milliamp hour capacity of your battery.

batteryCellCount.english: The number of cells in your battery.
batteryCellCount.translation: The number of cells in your battery.

vbatfullcellvoltage.english: The nominal voltage of a fully charged cell.
vbatfullcellvoltage.translation: The nominal voltage of a fully charged cell.

vbatmaxcellvoltage.english: The maximum voltage per cell before the high voltage alarm is triggered.
vbatmaxcellvoltage.translation: The maximum voltage per cell before the high voltage alarm is triggered.

vbatmincellvoltage.english: The minimum voltage per cell before the low voltage alarm is triggered.
vbatmincellvoltage.translation: The minimum voltage per cell before the low voltage alarm is triggered.

vbatwarningcellvoltage.english: The voltage per cell at which the low voltage alarm will start to sound.
vbatwarningcellvoltage.translation: The voltage per cell at which the low voltage alarm will start to sound.

half_duplex.english: Half duplex mode for ESC telemetry
half_duplex.translation: Half duplex mode for ESC telemetry

pin_swap.english: Swap the TX and RX pins for the ESC telemetry
pin_swap.translation: Swap the TX and RX pins for the ESC telemetry

gov_handover_throttle.english: Governor activates above this %. Below this the input throttle is passed to the ESC.
gov_handover_throttle.translation: Governor activates above this %. Below this the input throttle is passed to the ESC.

gov_recovery_time.english: Time constant for recovery spoolup, in seconds, measuring the time from zero to full headspeed.
gov_recovery_time.translation: Time constant for recovery spoolup, in seconds, measuring the time from zero to full headspeed.

gov_spoolup_min_throttle.english: Minimum throttle to use for slow spoolup, in percent. For electric motors the default is 5%, for nitro this should be set so the clutch starts to engage for a smooth spoolup 10-15%.
gov_spoolup_min_throttle.translation: Minimum throttle to use for slow spoolup, in percent. For electric motors the default is 5%, for nitro this should be set so the clutch starts to engage for a smooth spoolup 10-15%.

gov_spoolup_time.english: Time constant for slow spoolup, in seconds, measuring the time from zero to full headspeed.
gov_spoolup_time.translation: Time constant for slow spoolup, in seconds, measuring the time from zero to full headspeed.

gov_startup_time.english: Time constant for slow startup, in seconds, measuring the time from zero to full headspeed.
gov_startup_time.translation: Time constant for slow startup, in seconds, measuring the time from zero to full headspeed.

gov_tracking_time.english: Time constant for headspeed changes, in seconds, measuring the time from zero to full headspeed.
gov_tracking_time.translation: Time constant for headspeed changes, in seconds, measuring the time from zero to full headspeed.

collective_tilt_correction_neg.english: Adjust the collective tilt correction scaling for negative collective pitch.
collective_tilt_correction_neg.translation: Adjust the collective tilt correction scaling for negative collective pitch.

collective_tilt_correction_pos.english: Adjust the collective tilt correction scaling for positive collective pitch.
collective_tilt_correction_pos.translation: Adjust the collective tilt correction scaling for positive collective pitch.

swash_geo_correction.english: Adjust if there is too much negative collective or too much positive collective.
swash_geo_correction.translation: Adjust if there is too much negative collective or too much positive collective.

swash_phase.english: Phase offset for the swashplate controls.
swash_phase.translation: Phase offset for the swashplate controls.

swash_pitch_limit.english: Maximum amount of combined cyclic and collective blade pitch.
swash_pitch_limit.translation: Maximum amount of combined cyclic and collective blade pitch.

swash_trim_0.english: Swash trim to level the swash plate when using fixed links.
swash_trim_0.translation: Swash trim to level the swash plate when using fixed links.

swash_trim_1.english: Swash trim to level the swash plate when using fixed links.
swash_trim_1.translation: Swash trim to level the swash plate when using fixed links.

swash_trim_2.english: Swash trim to level the swash plate when using fixed links.
swash_trim_2.translation: Swash trim to level the swash plate when using fixed links.

tail_center_trim.english: Sets tail rotor trim for 0 yaw for variable pitch, or tail motor throttle for 0 yaw for motorized.
tail_center_trim.translation: Sets tail rotor trim for 0 yaw for variable pitch, or tail motor throttle for 0 yaw for motorized.

tail_motor_idle.english: Minimum throttle signal sent to the tail motor. This should be set just high enough that the motor does not stop.
tail_motor_idle.translation: Minimum throttle signal sent to the tail motor. This should be set just high enough that the motor does not stop.

maxthrottle.english: This PWM value is sent to the ESC/Servo at full throttle
maxthrottle.translation: This PWM value is sent to the ESC/Servo at full throttle

mincommand.english: This PWM value is sent when the motor is stopped
mincommand.translation: This PWM value is sent when the motor is stopped

minthrottle.english: This PWM value is sent to the ESC/Servo at low throttle
minthrottle.translation: This PWM value is sent to the ESC/Servo at low throttle

motor_pole_count_0.english: The number of magnets on the motor bell.
motor_pole_count_0.translation: The number of magnets on the motor bell.

motor_pwm_protocol.english: The protocol used to communicate with the ESC
motor_pwm_protocol.translation: The protocol used to communicate with the ESC

motor_pwm_rate.english: The frequency at which the ESC sends PWM signals to the motor
motor_pwm_rate.translation: The frequency at which the ESC sends PWM signals to the motor

help_p1.english: The accelerometer is used to measure the angle of the flight controller in relation to the horizon. This data is used to stabilize the aircraft and provide self-leveling functionality.
help_p1.translation: The accelerometer is used to measure the angle of the flight controller in relation to the horizon. This data is used to stabilize the aircraft and provide self-leveling functionality.

auto_detect_active_toggle.english: Auto-detect active: toggle desired AUX channel
auto_detect_active_toggle.translation: Auto-detect active: toggle desired AUX channel

msg_auto_detect_lock_first.english: Auto-detect is active for this row. Toggle to lock AUX first.
msg_auto_detect_lock_first.translation: Auto-detect is active for this row. Toggle to lock AUX first.

msg_auto_detect_lock_save.english: Auto-detect is active. Toggle the desired AUX channel first.
msg_auto_detect_lock_save.translation: Auto-detect is active. Toggle the desired AUX channel first.

help_p1.english: Set board roll, pitch and yaw mounting offsets.
help_p1.translation: Set board roll, pitch and yaw mounting offsets.

help_p2.english: Set magnetometer alignment and save to write EEPROM.
help_p2.translation: Set magnetometer alignment and save to write EEPROM.

help_p3.english: The visual below follows live attitude from MSP.
help_p3.translation: The visual below follows live attitude from MSP.

msg_reset_tail_view.english: Reset view yaw so the tail faces you?
msg_reset_tail_view.translation: Reset view yaw so the tail faces you?

help_p1.english: Configure Blackbox logging and monitor media status.
help_p1.translation: Configure Blackbox logging and monitor media status.

help_p2.english: Tool menu can erase onboard dataflash logs.
help_p2.translation: Tool menu can erase onboard dataflash logs.

help_p3.english: Mass-storage reboot is intentionally not included in this module.
help_p3.translation: Mass-storage reboot is intentionally not included in this module.

help_p1.english: Configure the motor and speed controller features.
help_p1.translation: Configure the motor and speed controller features.

error_busy.english: MSP queue is busy. Wait a moment and try again.
error_busy.translation: MSP queue is busy. Wait a moment and try again.

error_check_power.english: Check ESC power and wiring, then try again.
error_check_power.translation: Check ESC power and wiring, then try again.

error_choose_esc.english: Use the matching ESC manufacturer page.
error_choose_esc.translation: Use the matching ESC manufacturer page.

extra_msg_save.english: Please reboot the ESC to apply the changes
extra_msg_save.translation: Please reboot the ESC to apply the changes

help_p1.english: These parameters apply globally to the governor regardless of the profile in use.
help_p1.translation: These parameters apply globally to the governor regardless of the profile in use.

help_p2.english: Each parameter is simply a time value in seconds for each governor action.
help_p2.translation: Each parameter is simply a time value in seconds for each governor action.

disable_swash_override_message.english: Disable swash setup mode and return mixer control to the flight controller.
disable_swash_override_message.translation: Disable swash setup mode and return mixer control to the flight controller.

enable_swash_override_message.english:
Enable passthrough mixer override so you can move the sticks while adjusting swash geometry. 

Live changes from this page are sent to the flight controller.
enable_swash_override_message.translation:
Enable passthrough mixer override so you can move the sticks while adjusting swash geometry. 

Live changes from this page are sent to the flight controller.

help_p1.english: Adust swash plate geometry, phase angles, and limits.
help_p1.translation: Adust swash plate geometry, phase angles, and limits.

auto_detect_active.english: Auto-detect active: toggle desired AUX channel
auto_detect_active.translation: Auto-detect active: toggle desired AUX channel

msg_auto_detect_lock_first.english: Auto-detect is active for this row. Toggle to lock AUX first.
msg_auto_detect_lock_first.translation: Auto-detect is active for this row. Toggle to lock AUX first.

msg_auto_detect_lock_save.english: Auto-detect is active. Toggle the desired AUX channel first.
msg_auto_detect_lock_save.translation: Auto-detect is active. Toggle the desired AUX channel first.

msg_no_free_slots.english: No free mode slots remain. Delete an existing range first.
msg_no_free_slots.translation: No free mode slots remain. Delete an existing range first.

no_ranges.english: No ranges configured for this mode.
no_ranges.translation: No ranges configured for this mode.

help_p1.english: This tool provides the ability to send a custom byte string to the flight controller. It is useful for developers when debugging values.
help_p1.translation: This tool provides the ability to send a custom byte string to the flight controller. It is useful for developers when debugging values.

help_p2.english: If you do not understand what you are doing, do not use it as bad things can happen.
help_p2.translation: If you do not understand what you are doing, do not use it as bad things can happen.

start_prompt.english: Would you like to start the test? Choose the test run time below.
start_prompt.translation: Would you like to start the test? Choose the test run time below.

no_ports_reported.english: No serial ports reported by FC.
no_ports_reported.translation: No serial ports reported by FC.

help_p1.english: The battery settings are used to configure the flight controller to monitor the battery voltage and provide warnings when the voltage drops below a certain level.
help_p1.translation: The battery settings are used to configure the flight controller to monitor the battery voltage and provide warnings when the voltage drops below a certain level.

help_p1.english: Set the current flight profile or rate profile you would like to use.
help_p1.translation: Set the current flight profile or rate profile you would like to use.

help_p2.english: If you use a switch on your radio to change flight or rate modes, this will override this choice as soon as you toggle the switch.
help_p2.translation: If you use a switch on your radio to change flight or rate modes, this will override this choice as soon as you toggle the switch.

save_prompt.english: Save current page to flight controller?
save_prompt.translation: Save current page to flight controller?

disable_servo_override_msg.english: Return control of the servos to the flight controller.
disable_servo_override_msg.translation: Return control of the servos to the flight controller.

enable_servo_override_msg.english: Servo override allows you to 'trim' your servo center point in real time.
enable_servo_override_msg.translation: Servo override allows you to 'trim' your servo center point in real time.

no_themes_available_to_configure.english: No configurable themes installed on this device
no_themes_available_to_configure.translation: No configurable themes installed on this device

placeholder_audio_events.english: Event settings will be added here.
placeholder_audio_events.translation: Event settings will be added here.

placeholder_audio_switches.english: Switch settings will be added here.
placeholder_audio_switches.translation: Switch settings will be added here.

placeholder_audio_timer.english: Timer settings will be added here.
placeholder_audio_timer.translation: Timer settings will be added here.

placeholder_dashboard_settings.english: Dashboard settings will be added here.
placeholder_dashboard_settings.translation: Dashboard settings will be added here.

placeholder_dashboard_theme.english: Theme settings will be added here.
placeholder_dashboard_theme.translation: Theme settings will be added here.

help_p1.english: Use this module to update the recorded flight statistics on the flight controller.
help_p1.translation: Use this module to update the recorded flight statistics on the flight controller.

reload_prompt.english: Reload local flight stats from the model file?
reload_prompt.translation: Reload local flight stats from the model file?

save_prompt.english: Save local flight stats and sync them to the flight controller?
save_prompt.translation: Save local flight stats and sync them to the flight controller?

no_more_than_40.english: No more than 40 sensors can be enabled at once
no_more_than_40.translation: No more than 40 sensors can be enabled at once

disable_mixer_message.english: Return control of the servos to the flight controller.
disable_mixer_message.translation: Return control of the servos to the flight controller.

enable_mixer_message.english:
Set all servos to their configured center position. 

This will result in all values on this page being saved when adjusting the servo trim.
enable_mixer_message.translation:
Set all servos to their configured center position. 

This will result in all values on this page being saved when adjusting the servo trim.

msg_background_task_missing_body.english: Rotorflight background task is not running. Enable it before opening menus.
msg_background_task_missing_body.translation: Rotorflight background task is not running. Enable it before opening menus.

msg_save_current_page.english: Save current page to flight controller?
msg_save_current_page.translation: Save current page to flight controller?

adjustment_active.english: Selection disabled because Battery Profile adjustment is configured.
adjustment_active.translation: Selection disabled because Battery Profile adjustment is configured.

msg_select_battery.english: Please select the battery you want to use:
msg_select_battery.translation: Please select the battery you want to use:

write_failed.english: Battery profile could not be saved.
write_failed.translation: Battery profile could not be saved.

reset_flight_ask_text.english: Are you sure you want to reset the flight?
reset_flight_ask_text.translation: Are you sure you want to reset the flight?

startup_no_link_detail.english: Power model and wait for telemetry.
startup_no_link_detail.translation: Power model and wait for telemetry.
